mapper.select: SELECT TOP 500 Row_Number() OVER (order by TF.FltpCode, TF.FileName) AS RNUM ,TF.FileID ,0 as CHK ,TF.InstanceNo ,TF.InstanceClass ,TF.LinkType ,TF.FileName ,TF.FltpCode AS FltpCode ,TF.FileFormat ,TF.FileRealName ,TF.FileSize ,TF.FileMgt ,TF.RegMemberID ,CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,TF.CreationTime),21) as CreationTime ,CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,TF.LastUpdated),21) as LastUpdated ,TF.LastUser ,TF.Version ,TF.DownCNT ,ISNULL(TM.Name, '') WriteUserNM ,TFT.FilePath+TF.FileName as SysFile ,TFT.FilePath+TF.FileRealName as OrigFile ,TFT.FilePath ,TFT.FilePath as ExtFileURL ,TD.Name AS FltpName ,TFT.FileOption FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_INSTANCE_FILE TF LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM ON TF.RegMemberID = TM.MemberID LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP TFT ON TF.FltpCode = TFT.FltpCode LEFT OUTER JOIN XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD ON TF.FltpCode = TD.TypeCode AND TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} Where TF.InstanceClass = #{instanceClass} And TF.InstanceNo = #{instanceNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE XBOLTAPP.PIM_INSTANCE_FILE SET DownCNT = ISNULL(DownCNT,0)+1 Where FileID = #{fileID}
mapper.select: SELECT TF.FileName AS filename , TF.FileRealName AS original , ISNULL(TDF.FilePath,TF.FilePath) + TF.FileName AS downFile FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_INSTANCE_FILE TF Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP TDF On TF.FltpCode = TDF.FltpCode WHERE TF.FileID = #{fileID}

Select TF.FileID , TF.FileID As Seq , TM.Name AS WriterName , TTT.Name AS TeamName , TF.FltpCode AS FltpCode , CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,TF.LastUpdated),21) AS LastUpdated , CONVERT(CHAR(10),CONVERT(datetime,TF.CreationTime),21) AS CreationTime , TIA.PlainText AS Path , TF.Description, TF.FilePath + TF.FileName As SysFile , TF.InstanceNo As InstanceNo , TF.InstanceNo As DocumentID , TF.FileName, TF.FileRealName, TF.FilePath , TD.Name As FltpName , '' AS ProjectID, '' As ParentID, '' AS ProjectName, '' As CsrName , TF.FileMgt As FileMgt From XBOLTAPP.PIM_INSTANCE_FILE TF Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER TM On TM.MemberID = TF.RegMemberID Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_TEAM_TXT TTT ON TTT.TeamID = TM.TeamID And TTT.LanguageID = #{languageID} Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_ITEM_ATTR TIA ON TIA.ItemID = TF.ItemID And TIA.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TIA.AttrTypeCode = 'AT00001' Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_FLTP TDFT ON TDFT.FltpCode = TF.FltpCode Left Outer Join XBOLTADM.TB_DICTIONARY TD On TF.FltpCode = TD.TypeCode And TD.LanguageID = #{languageID} And TD.Category = 'FLTP' Where TF.FileID = #{fileID}
SELECT FileRealName FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_INSTANCE_FILE WHERE FileID = #{fileID}
SELECT FileName FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_INSTANCE_FILE WHERE FileID = #{fileID}
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(FileID)+1,'1') AS FILEID_NEXTVAL FROM XBOLTAPP.PIM_INSTANCE_FILE
